assumptions: The concept targets businesses in Suriname unless a narrower audience is supplied.
Placement dimensions, safe areas, eligibility, and overlays require current platform preview before publication.
Exact copy and the official Zenta logo will be added during final design production, not image prompting.

campaign.audience: local business owners in Suriname whose essential discovery information is missing or unclear

creative_strategy.audience_insight: A customer may decide whether to visit based on practical details such as hours, location, and contact information.
creative_strategy.message_angle: Accurate profile information reduces uncertainty at a decision moment.
creative_strategy.hook: Correct details matter before the visit.
creative_strategy.hypothesis: A real pre-visit moment will make information accuracy more relevant than an abstract profile screenshot.

format.crop_guidance: Keep the focal subject and reserved copy area inside the central composition with generous edge clearance.

visual_direction.subject: a customer pausing before leaving home while checking practical business details on a phone
visual_direction.action: three abstract cues for time, location, and contact align into one confident next step
visual_direction.environment: a bright residential entryway in Suriname with keys and a reusable shopping bag
visual_direction.composition: human moment right-center, abstract detail cues near phone, open left-side copy space
visual_direction.lighting: clean morning daylight with restrained lime confirmation accents
visual_direction.style: natural documentary advertising photography with minimal graphical augmentation

copy.overlay_headline: Correct details matter before the visit.
copy.caption: Opening hours, location, and contact details help customers decide what to do next. Zenta helps businesses organize that information clearly.

image_prompt: Create a polished 4:5 base image concept for a Zenta Creative paid ad image. The central subject is a customer pausing before leaving home while checking practical business details on a phone. Show three abstract cues for time, location, and contact align into one confident next step. Set the scene in a bright residential entryway in Suriname with keys and a reusable shopping bag. Composition: human moment right-center, abstract detail cues near phone, open left-side copy space. Lighting: clean morning daylight with restrained lime confirmation accents. Visual style: natural documentary advertising photography with minimal graphical augmentation. Use Zenta's near-black foundation with the controlled palette #030507, #F4F7FB, #B9FF66, #5EE7FF, #9B7CFF; keep lime as the decisive action accent rather than flooding the image with one hue. The image must communicate the strategic angle 'Accurate profile information reduces uncertainty at a decision moment.' without claiming a result. Reserve clean, high-contrast negative space for the headline 'Correct details matter before the visit.', support line 'Google Business Profile + Maps', and CTA 'Fix your business information' to be typeset later by a designer. Do not render any words, letters, prices, logo, wordmark, platform mark, interface copy, or functional QR code inside the base image. Keep the focal subject and copy-safe space comfortably away from edges for placement preview. Avoid Google screens, map pins, star ratings, or claims that correct details guarantee visits, fake evidence, visual clutter, and distorted objects or anatomy.
negative_constraints: no generated logo, wordmark, trademark, or third-party platform branding
no fabricated metrics, rankings, leads, revenue, testimonials, or guarantees
no copied Google, Meta, Facebook, Instagram, or WhatsApp interface
no tiny unreadable text, random letters, watermark, or signature
no stereotypes, unapproved likenesses, or identifiable private customer data
Google screens, map pins, star ratings, or claims that correct details guarantee visits

accessibility.alt_text: A customer checks time, location, and contact cues on a phone before leaving home.
accessibility.contrast_note: Typeset final copy in white or near-black on a solid high-contrast area and verify readability at mobile size.

required_review: Do not imply guaranteed ranking, traffic, calls, visits, or Google affiliation.
Confirm the base image contains no generated branding, fake proof, copied platform trade dress, or private data.
Preview final typography, logo placement, crop, and overlays in every intended placement.

production.typography_instruction: Add the exact overlay copy later using Zenta's bold modern geometric sans-serif system; do not ask an image model to typeset it.
production.logo_instruction: Reserve space for the approved Zenta logo and place the original brand asset only during final design production.
